title: BW SARS-CoV-2 Laboratory Test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"40g3l","text":"This protocol is the laboratory-based equivalent of the LAMP assay used for detecting SARS-CoV-2. A similar protocol is performed automatically within the Biology Works LLC at-home device.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"68ss5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"17aie","text":"This protocol is not approved at this time by any regulatory body for clinical use. It uses proprietary reagents available from Biology Works LLC and other vendors. Repetitive freezing of primers is not recommended; please store them at 4°C when not in use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"61i68","text":"Acquire a nasal or saliva sample for use with this assay. The Chai Bio 1-step DNA/RNA Extraction Buffer (Cat. 05210S) has been demonstrated as being compatible with nasal swabs using this protocol. Saliva samples must be heat denatured at 95°C for 10 minutes. warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"begpl","text":"This protocol is not approved at this time by any regulatory body for clinical use. You must follow all safety protocols specified by each vendor, your laboratory, common sense, and regulatory bodies in your geography. All specimens, reagents, and equipment must be handled asceptically. Personal protective equipment, including appropriate gloves, clothing and protective eye ware must be worn at all times. steps: Thaw reagents to room temperature Room temperature WarmStart LAMP Kit (DNA and RNA) - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #E1700S Guanidine HCL Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G7294 BW SARS-CoV-2 Primer Mix Biology Works LLC Catalog #SARS-CoV-2 Primer Mix LAMP Fluorescent Dye New England Biolabs Catalog #B1700AA
Briefly spin down components in a microcentrifuge 00:00:05 Microcentrifuge (VWR, 75993-410)
Prepare master mix in a 1.5mL tube with the following sub-steps Seal-Rite 1.5mL Microcentrifugre Tube (USA Scientific, 1615-5510)
Add 12.5 µL to tube WarmStart LAMP Kit (DNA and RNA) - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #E1700S
Briefly spin down components in a microcentrifuge 00:00:05
Aliquot out 20uL into a PCR reaction plate Microamp Optical 96-well Reaction Plate (Thermo-Fisher, N8010560)
Dispense 5 µL of your sample solution into the well
Seal plate with film Microamp Optical Adhesive Film (Thermo-Fisher, 4311971)
Centrifuge plate in plate centrifuge 500 rcf, °C, Centrifuge 5810 R (Plate Centrifure, Eppendorf, 022625101)
Place plate with reagents and sample into thermo-cycler 7500 Real Time PCR System (ABI, 4351104)
Run assay on thermo-cycler with the following protocol (specific to the ABI 7500): 1x 25 °C 00:02:00 60x 64.9 °C 00:00:02 and 65 °C 00:00:30 Record measurements
Add .3125 µL to tube Guanidine HCL Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G7294
Add 4 µL to tube BW SARS-CoV-2 Primer Mix Biology Works LLC Catalog #SARS-CoV-2 Primer Mix
Add 0.5 µL to tube LAMP Fluorescent Dye New England Biolabs Catalog #B1700AA
Add 2.8 µL to tube HyClone Water GE Healthcare Catalog #SH30538LS
